## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Vapi and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, design updates, and next steps for content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO efforts showing early positive results: 4 posts ranking in top 5, 6 in top 40 for target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Custom agent pages generating impressions (96/100 with at least one impression)](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Design updates for custom agent pages discussed; focus on condensing hero section](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Tracking conversions from content pages identified as a priority; exploring cost-effective solutions](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

## Topics

### SEO Progress and Strategy

  - [4 posts ranking in top 5, 6 in top 40 for target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [96/100 custom agent pages receiving impressions](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Focus on zero-volume keywords showing promise (20%+ of daily searches are new)](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Strategy: Continue publishing cadence, optimize clicking pages, monitor LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### Custom Agent Page Design

  - [Condensing hero section to show more content above the fold](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Discussing balance between consistency with homepage and unique design](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Agreed to keep current design for now, focus on user experience and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Planning to add custom dropdown component](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [Identifying successful content types (e.g., Lex.Logflow, LLM focus)](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Planning to double down on top-performing pages (top 5 and top 40)](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Exploring addition of more descriptive, long-form content to some pages](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Conversion Tracking

  - [Current limitations in tracking conversions from content pages](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Exploring cost-effective solutions (e.g., Koala, Common Room)](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Marcel offered to help negotiate with Koala for potential setup](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)

### Website Redesign Project

  - [Vapi team evaluating proposals from WebStacks, Lightbox, and another agency](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [Marcel provided insights on agency strengths (WebStacks for conversion, Lightbox for unique design)](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

### Blog Page Updates

  - [Planning to implement featured section with multiple articles](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
  - [Adding tag in KeyStatic to control featured posts](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kirkland to update custom agent page design and push PR](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)
  - [Jordan to coordinate call with Vapi team to discuss product and marketing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
  - [Explore cost-effective conversion tracking solutions after new DevRel starts (Natish, starting 6/12)](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Yoshita to make final decision on website redesign agency](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [Matthew and Kirkland to implement blog page updates with featured section](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
  - [Continue optimizing top-performing content and publishing new pieces](https://fathom.video/share/d2x-KLsaYoaHj65hKFLx3csVRrxzwgLm?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
